pr.title: Partial matching of Sysdolphin's tev.c and cleanup of some rodata incbin usage
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Partially decompiled Sysdolphin tev support by adding src/sysdolphin/tev.c and tev.h, moving several small allocation/accessor/state functions out of raw asm, and renaming known GX channel functions across assembly callsites. The PR also replaced rodata incbins that were actually function-pointer tables with explicit .4byte entries, split related sdata incbins into smaller labels, and removed now-unnecessary force_active pragmas from functions that became naturally referenced by those tables.
what_changed: Added src/sysdolphin/tev.c with HSD_RenderInitAllocData, HSD_RenderGetAllocData, HSD_TevRegGetAllocData, HSD_ChanGetAllocData, HSD_SetupChannel, and HSD_StateSetNumChans.
Added src/sysdolphin/tev.h declaring the new Sysdolphin tev functions and included global.h for s32 and related project types.
Added src/sysdolphin/tev.o to obj_files.mk before the remaining asm/tev.o, enabling partial C decomp while keeping unmatched tev assembly.
Removed a large block from asm/tev.s, consistent with moving matched or partially matched tev functionality into src/sysdolphin/tev.c.

Renamed known GX functions from address-style names to SDK-style names in asm and headers: func_8033E28C to GXSetChanAmbColor, func_8033E3F4 to GXSetChanMatColor, func_8033E55C to GXSetNumChans, and func_8033E5A8 to GXSetChanCtrl.
Updated many assembly callsites in GXInit, psdisp, code_80008D30, displayfunc, state, text files, sislib, sobj, and related files to call the newly named GX channel functions.
Added function prototypes for GXSetChanAmbColor, GXSetChanMatColor, and GXSetChanCtrl in include/functions.h, with comments noting the probable GX SDK signatures.
Replaced rodata incbins at lbl_803B94E0 and lbl_803B94FC with explicit .4byte function pointer tables for HSD forget-memory and get-alloc-data functions, including NULL terminators.
Included macros.inc in asm/rodata.s so NULL could be used in the explicit rodata pointer table.
Split a larger asm/sdata.s incbin beginning around lbl_804D5E1C into smaller global labels such as lbl_804D5E20, lbl_804D5E28, lbl_804D5E30, and subsequent entries used by the new rodata table.

Added .global labels in assembly for functions that needed to be referenced directly by rodata tables, including HSD_SListGetAllocData, HSD_DListGetAllocData, HSD_VecGetAllocData, HSD_MtxGetAllocData, HSD_RObjGetAllocData, HSD_RvalueObjGetAllocData, _HSD_DispForgetMemory, and _HSD_ObjAllocForgetMemory.
Removed force_active pragmas from HSD_AObjGetAllocData, HSD_FObjGetAllocData, HSD_IDGetAllocData, and _HSD_IDForgetMemory after explicit rodata references made those functions naturally retained.
smart_moves: The rodata cleanup did more than reduce incbin size: by expressing the function-pointer tables explicitly, the referenced GetAllocData and ForgetMemory functions no longer needed force_active workarounds to stay linked.
Splitting the sdata incbin into smaller named chunks made each data entry addressable from the rodata table without requiring the entire blob to remain anonymous.
Adding .global labels at exact assembly boundaries allowed existing raw asm functions to participate in C-visible data tables without requiring those functions to be decompiled first.
The PR preserved matching safety by mixing C, inline asm, NON_MATCHING guarded C, and remaining asm objects instead of forcing an all-or-nothing tev.c conversion.
Renaming GX channel functions across callsites improved semantic readability immediately and made later decompilation easier by replacing address labels with recognizable SDK-style APIs.
decomp_lessons: When an incbin contains a function-pointer table, replacing it with explicit .4byte symbol references can solve both data documentation and linker liveness problems.
Small accessor functions such as HSD_*GetAllocData are good early decomp targets because they expose allocation-data symbols and can unlock rodata table cleanup.
Partial object migration can be done by adding a new src object before the old asm object while leaving unmatched functions in asm.
For incomplete struct knowledge, this PR used extern byte arrays for allocation data labels, such as u8 lbl_804C07F8[0x1C], while still documenting likely meanings in comments.
Known SDK function names should be propagated through assembly callsites as soon as confidence is high; this makes unrelated future diffs easier to review.
Explicit NULL entries in rodata tables require the right macro include in assembly files, here macros.inc.
A function can be made force-active naturally by finding and materializing the data table that references it, rather than keeping compiler pragmas as a permanent workaround.
naming_conventions: func_8033E55C was renamed to GXSetNumChans in assembly callsites, though include/functions.h still left the old commented placeholder for that address in the shown excerpt.
HSD allocation-data accessors use HSD_<Type>GetAllocData, for example HSD_RenderGetAllocData, HSD_TevRegGetAllocData, HSD_ChanGetAllocData, HSD_SListGetAllocData, and HSD_MtxGetAllocData.
Internal forget-memory functions use a leading underscore, for example _HSD_DispForgetMemory, _HSD_ObjAllocForgetMemory, and _HSD_IDForgetMemory.
The new header used the existing lowercase Sysdolphin filename style, src/sysdolphin/tev.h, with include guard _tev_h_.
Comments in include/functions.h preserved likely official GX typedef-based signatures while keeping provisional int-based prototypes.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used inline asm in src/sysdolphin/tev.c for HSD_RenderInitAllocData and HSD_SetupChannel where full C matching was not yet achieved.
Provided a NON_MATCHING C version of HSD_RenderInitAllocData as readable documentation while retaining the matching asm implementation.
Used #pragma peephole on around HSD_StateSetNumChans, indicating a compiler-codegen tactic for matching the small state wrapper.
Added explicit .global labels inside existing asm files to expose functions that were previously only reachable as labels following earlier code.
Converted rodata incbins to .4byte symbol entries, including HSD_*GetAllocData function pointers paired with sdata labels and NULL terminators.
Split one large sdata incbin into multiple labeled incbins with exact byte sizes so individual labels could match pointer-table entries.
Updated branch-and-link comments in assembly from generic func_* labels to semantic GX names without changing instruction bytes.
Kept remaining unmatched tev assembly in asm/tev.s while compiling the newly matched source file as a separate object.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews were present in the provided PR slice, so there is no explicit reviewer feedback to extract.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that replace the inline asm HSD_SetupChannel with matching C or introduce real structs for channel/render/tevreg allocation data.
Search for remaining references to func_8033E55C or func_8033E5A8 to confirm GXSetNumChans and GXSetChanCtrl naming was fully propagated later.
Inspect later rodata/sdata cleanup PRs that use explicit function-pointer tables to remove force_active pragmas.
Look for eventual typing of lbl_804C07F8, lbl_804C0824, and lbl_804C0850 as HSD_ObjAllocData or concrete Sysdolphin allocation structures.
Search for follow-up changes to include/functions.h prototypes using GXChannelID, GXColor, GXBool, GXColorSrc, GXLightID, GXDiffuseFn, and GXAttnFn.
